data.title: Source hook-error-handler.sh in all 7 pre-* dispatchers with fail-open guard
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Modify all 7 pre-* dispatcher files to source hook-error-handler.sh with a fail-open guard and register _dso_hook_err_handler as their ERR trap.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-bash.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-all.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-edit.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-write.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-exitplanmode.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-taskoutput.sh |

## Implementation
In each of the 7 files, after the standard _PLUGIN_ROOT resolution block, add:

  # Source shared ERR handler (fail-open: if missing, continue without trap)
  _HOOKS_LIB_DIR="${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib"
  if [ -f "${_HOOKS_LIB_DIR}/hook-error-handler.sh" ]; then
    source "${_HOOKS_LIB_DIR}/hook-error-handler.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
    _dso_register_hook_err_handler "<dispatcher-name>.sh"
  fi

Where <dispatcher-name> is the name of the specific dispatcher file.

ERR trap semantics: exit 0 (top-level script, not function — exit is correct, not return)

## Depends On
- cf7e-9d63 (RED test must exist before implementation)
